tools.name: evaluate_spend
tools.description: Check whether an autonomous agent is allowed to make a purchase BEFORE spending. Returns APPROVED, BLOCKED, or FLAGGED.

tools.name: add_spend_rule
tools.description: Add a spend policy rule. Types: per_transaction, daily_total, velocity, merchant_block, category_limit, approval_threshold.

tools.name: firewall_status
tools.description: Get current firewall stats: spend approved/blocked today, pending approvals, active agents.
